overrides.reason: Denial of service via zero-step sequence expansion causing process hang and memory exhaustion; explicit range-specific overrides force safe transitive versions for the installed minimatch majors.
Denial of service via large numeric ranges defeating documented max protection; explicit override forces the safe transitive version for the minimatch 10.x branch.
Method injection in POSIX character classes can cause incorrect glob matching; explicit override forces the safe transitive version.
Regular expression denial of service via extglob quantifiers; explicit override forces the safe transitive version.
Cross-site scripting via unescaped style tags in CSS stringify output; explicit override forces Next's nested PostCSS dependency to a patched version while staying on the current stable Next release.
Arbitrary file read via sourceMappingURL comment allows an attacker to read any source map file from the system running Babel; explicit override forces the safe transitive version.
Quadratic-complexity denial of service via repeated YAML merge-key aliases causes CPU exhaustion; explicit override forces gray-matter's nested js-yaml dependency to the patched version.
